title: 精いっぱいお手伝いするぞー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: While passing by a ramen shop one day...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, sir! We've got this!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Time to help out like I've never helped out
before!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The owner of this ramen shop hurt his back, so
Tsuru and I have decided to help him!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to drag you two into this. You Tracen
students are all such good eggs.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! I'll handle the dishes, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Okay! I'll take out the trash in the meantime!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew. That's it for the trash. I wonder how Tsuru
is—

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Tsuru, what's wrong?! Why do you look so
exhausted?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Wheeze... I-I washed... the pot... a little too vigorously... and started feeling out of breath...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Huff... Sorry... I just need... a little break... Urk.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for worrying you like that. I'm okay now,
though! Time to get back to those dishes!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! But what if you faint again?!
choice_data_list: Here, let me teach you some dishwashing tricks.
Maybe you should serve the customers instead.
Maybe you should serve the customers instead.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! But what if you faint again?!
choice_data_list: Here, let me teach you some dishwashing tricks.
Maybe you should serve the customers instead.
Maybe you should serve the customers instead.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Dishwashing tricks?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! If you know how to wash them
efficiently, then you won't risk overexerting
yourself again!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: That makes sense! Right! I'm all ears, then!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I feel like I've gotten it down now. Time to
get washing!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Take this, and this, and this, and this! NEXT!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: HAAARGH! Let me at that next pot!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Huff! Wheeze! Puff! H-huh? I'm starting to feel tired again...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Tsuru! I think you'd better slow down a little!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how hard she tries to hold back,
Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi keeps going overboard.
However, she somehow manages to help out until
the end.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Dealing with customers is definitely less
taxing on the body! I'll take care of the dishes,
Tsuru, so go ahead and handle the customers!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Sorry for causing so much trouble...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I won't let your kindness go to waste, though!
Time to help some customers! Here I gooo!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: WELCOOOME! Cough, cough!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: One order of soy sauce ramen, STAT! Cough, cough! Hack!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has a few shaky moments even while serving
the customers, but Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi is able to
finish helping out until the end.
